```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/state_machine.py",
  "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\n\r\n\r\nclass InvalidStateTransition(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _record_event(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    old: Optional[JobState],\r\n    new: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    event = JobEvent(\r\n        job_id=job.id,\r\n        old_state=old,\r\n        new_state=new,\r\n        message=message,\r\n        data=metadata or {},\r\n    )\r\n    session.add(event)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def transition_state(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    new_state: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Validate and perform a state transition, recording a JobEvent.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    old = job.state\r\n\r\n    if not _is_valid_transition(old, new_state):\r\n        raise InvalidStateTransition(f\"Cannot transition {old} -> {new_state}\")\r\n\r\n    job.state = new_state\r\n    job.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n    await _record_event(session, job, old, new_state, message, metadata)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_valid_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\r\n    if old == new:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.QUEUED and new in {\r\n        JobState.RUNNING,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.RUNNING and new in {\r\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\r\n        JobState.FAILED,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD} and new == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    # Terminal states remain terminal\r\n    if old in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED}:\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    return False\r\n\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 03:23:19 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "src/miniqueue/state_machine.py", "3:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\n\r\n\r\nclass InvalidStateTransition(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _record_event(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    old: Optional[JobState],\r\n    new: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    event = JobEvent(\r\n        job_id=job.id,\r\n        old_state=old,\r\n        new_state=new,\r\n        message=message,\r\n        data=metadata or {},\r\n    )\r\n    session.add(event)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def transition_state(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    new_state: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Validate and perform a state transition, recording a JobEvent.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    old = job.state\r\n\r\n    if not _is_valid_transition(old, new_state):\r\n        raise InvalidStateTransition(f\"Cannot transition {old} -> {new_state}\")\r\n\r\n    job.state = new_state\r\n    job.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n    await _record_event(session, job, old, new_state, message, metadata)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_valid_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\r\n    if old == new:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.QUEUED and new in {\r\n        JobState.RUNNING,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.RUNNING and new in {\r\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\r\n        JobState.FAILED,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD} and new == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    # Terminal states remain terminal\r\n    if old in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED}:\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    return False\r\n\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
